overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V style) depicting a character walking through a rainy neon-lit urban downtown at night. The character crosses a wet intersection, proceeds down a city street lined with brick warehouses and modern skyscrapers, and turns into a narrow alleyway beside a depository building.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with crosswalk and neon-lit bridge

events.description: character crosses the wet intersection while a white sedan waits at the traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet crosswalk away from the camera toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at the intersection waiting for the traffic light
pedestrian in yellow jacket crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: large red neon-lit bridge structure glowing in the background
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner
multi-story building with illuminated windows lining the street
tall downtown skyscrapers with lit windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy urban intersection at night. The camera follows a character crossing the wet street while a white sedan waits at the traffic light. Neon-lit bridge structures glow red in the background, and the downtown skyline rises in the distance. Other pedestrians are visible crossing the street in the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street lined with commercial warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the wet city street past parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving slowly down the street alongside the character

entered.detail: large brick warehouse building with DEPOSITORY signage and metal roll-up doors
illuminated advertising billboard with pink and white lights

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the main city street, passing the white sedan as it drives alongside. The brick Depository building comes into view on the right, featuring illuminated windows and industrial roll-up doors. The wet asphalt reflects the streetlights and neon signs while the downtown skyscrapers remain visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between brick warehouse buildings

events.description: turns right from main street into narrow alley beside the depository building

agents.ego_description: turns right at the street corner and proceeds down the narrow alleyway between buildings

entered.detail: narrow passage between tall brick buildings with wet concrete surface
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and street lighting
large industrial waste container against the right wall
red neon bridge structure visible at the end of the alley tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrow enclosed alleyway, transitioning from the open street to a confined passage between brick warehouse walls. The Depository building now runs along the left side, while utility poles and a metal dumpster occupy the alley. The red neon bridge becomes visible again in the distance at the alley's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit downtown intersection that gradually narrows into a confined industrial alleyway. It begins with the camera trailing a character crossing a wet street amidst other pedestrians, while a white sedan waits at a traffic light against a backdrop of glowing red bridge structures and a distant skyline. As the character proceeds forward, the scene opens up along a main city street where the white sedan drives alongside and the illuminated windows of a brick Depository building emerge on the right. The camera then shifts focus as the character turns right, transitioning from the open, reflective asphalt of the boulevard into a narrow passage enclosed by brick warehouse walls. Finally, the environment tightens around the character between utility poles and a metal dumpster, with the red neon bridge reappearing in the distance at the alley's end.
